title: Println Basics
instruction: Print Hello on one line and World on the next using two Println calls.

title: Printf with %s and %d
instruction: Use Printf to print Name: Alice, Age: 30 using variables.

title: Float Formatting
instruction: Print pi (3.14159) with exactly 2 decimal places (3.14).

title: Build a URL with Sprintf
instruction: Use Sprintf to build http://localhost:8080/api from host and port, then print it.
starter:
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	host := "localhost"
	port := 8080
	url := ""
	// TODO: Sprintf URL
	_ = host
	_ = port
	fmt.Println(url)
}

title: Any Type with %v and %T
instruction: Print 42 and hello each with value and type (%v and %T).
hint:
fmt.Printf("%v is of type %T
", n, n)
